name: Ribbed Scallop Cake Stand - Threshold™
description:
Display your cake elegantly with this Ribbed Scallop Cake Stand from Threshold™. Made of stoneware material, this cake stand features a scalloped edge accentuated with gold-tone detailing that beautifully frames your delicious cake. Designed in round shape, this white cake stand also boast a ribbed pattern for a textured look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
